name: Governance automation
summary: Repository-enforced milestone automation and anti-drift infrastructure.
goal: Build the milestone operating system that controls future Codex work without changing pairtools runtime behavior.
explicit_non_goals: Do not add merge, dedup, select, split, stats, parse2, header, restrict, phase, sample, scaling, or filterbycov behavior.
oracle_commands: Not applicable for M000; no pairtools behavior is changed.
required_tests: python3 -m py_compile scripts/milestone_gate.py scripts/codex_report.py scripts/check_no_runtime_pairtools.py scripts/check_no_noop_flags.py scripts/check_docs_sync.py scripts/check_parse_lite_drift.py scripts/check_changed_paths.py scripts/check_milestone_schema.py scripts/check_cargo_needed.py scripts/record_test_result.py scripts/list_milestones.py scripts/codex_next.py
acceptance_criteria: Milestone schema and registry exist and validate.
Preflight records branch, commit, status, timestamp, scope, docs, and process state.
Postflight enforces path boundaries, docs updates, runtime external-tool policy, compatibility-ignore text policy, and legacy parser framing policy.
Cargo wrapper prevents duplicate build jobs and captures logs.
Final report helper prints required fields without fabricating results.
AGENTS.md requires the milestone gate workflow.
known_risks: The Python gates use heuristic text scans and are not a substitute for review.
Changed-path detection includes untracked directories before staging and exact files after staging.
Cargo need detection treats documentation-only files as docs even when they live under tests/.
